return f(h)end,function(u,g)local f=G(g)local B=function(B)return d(u,{B},g,f)end return B end,function(u,g)local f=G(g)local B=function(B,w,r,X,h,b)return d(u,{B;w;r;X,h;b},g,f)end return B end,function(u,g)local f=G(g)local B=function(B,w)return d(u,{B;w},g,f)end return B end,function(u,g)local f=G(g)local B=function(B,w,r,X,h)return d(u,{B,w;r;X;h},g,f)end return B end,function(u)I[u]=I[u]-(-657126+657127)if 818422+-818422==I[u]then I[u],b[u]=nil,nil end end,function(u,g)local f=G(g)local B=function(...)return d(u,{...},g,f)end return B end,{},function(u,g)local f=G(g)local B=function()return d(u,{},g,f)end return B end,{},1030961-1030961 return(Q(8556724-(-266807),{}))(f(h))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[g(-718061+759054)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
